allow: Bash(powershell -c "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_OwningProcess } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''{s[""id""]}: {s.get\(""name"",""""\)} year={s.get\(""year"",""""\)}''\) for s in d.get\(''seasons'',d\)[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=[p for p in d.get\(''paths'',{}\) if ''top'' in p]; print\(''\\n''.join\(paths\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) paths=d.get\(''paths'',{}\) for p in sorted\(paths.keys\(\)\): if ''top'' in p.lower\(\): methods = list\(paths[p].keys\(\)\) print\(f''{methods[0].upper\(\)} {p}''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''sc:'''', d.get\(''''sc''''\)\); dd=d.get\(''''d'''',{}\); print\(''''pNo:'''', dd.get\(''''pNo''''\)\); print\(''''start:'''', dd.get\(''''programStartDate''''\)\); print\(''''end:'''', dd.get\(''''programEndDate''''\)\); matches=dd.get\(''''matches'''',[]\); print\(''''matchCount:'''', len\(matches\)\); m=matches[0] if matches else {}; print\(''''first match result field:'''', repr\(m.get\(''''result''''\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./betguess.db''\); const tables = db.prepare\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' AND name=''forum_notifications''""\).all\(\); console.log\(''Table exists:'', tables.length > 0\); if \(tables.length > 0\) { const info = db.prepare\(''PRAGMA table_info\(forum_notifications\)''\).all\(\); console.log\(''Columns:'', info.map\(c => c.name\).join\('', ''\)\); const count = db.prepare\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM forum_notifications''\).get\(\); console.log\(''Rows:'', count.cnt\); }")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./data/betguess.db''\); const tables = db.prepare\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' AND name=''forum_notifications''""\).all\(\); console.log\(''Table exists:'', tables.length > 0\); if \(tables.length > 0\) { const info = db.prepare\(''PRAGMA table_info\(forum_notifications\)''\).all\(\); console.log\(''Columns:'', info.map\(c => c.name\).join\('', ''\)\); const count = db.prepare\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM forum_notifications''\).get\(\); console.log\(''Rows:'', count.cnt\); } else { console.log\(''All tables:'', db.prepare\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table''""\).all\(\).map\(t => t.name\).join\('', ''\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./data/betguess.db''\); const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT n.*, u.username as actor_username FROM forum_notifications n JOIN users u ON u.id = n.actor_id''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./data/betguess.db''\); const users = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, username, email, role FROM users LIMIT 5''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(users, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''bcrypt''\); const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./data/betguess.db''\); const user = db.prepare\(''SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id = 1''\).get\(\); console.log\(''Hash:'', user.password_hash\); bcrypt.compare\(''admin123'', user.password_hash\).then\(r => console.log\(''admin123:'', r\)\); bcrypt.compare\(''test123'', user.password_hash\).then\(r => console.log\(''test123:'', r\)\); bcrypt.compare\(''password'', user.password_hash\).then\(r => console.log\(''password:'', r\)\); bcrypt.compare\(''123456'', user.password_hash\).then\(r => console.log\(''123456:'', r\)\);")
Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies2.txt http://localhost:3001/api/forum/topics/1/comments -H "Content-Type: application/json" -X POST -d "{""body"":""Harika analiz! Galatasaray bu mac cok guclü.""}")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''./data/betguess.db''\); const notif = db.prepare\(""SELECT n.*, u.username as actor_username FROM forum_notifications n JOIN users u ON u.id = n.actor_id WHERE n.type = ''reaction_on_topic'' ORDER BY n.id DESC LIMIT 1""\).get\(\); console.log\(''Notification:'', notif\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/betguess.db''\); const u = db.prepare\(''SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id=1''\).get\(\); console.log\(u.password_hash.substring\(0, 20\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''bcryptjs''\); const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/betguess.db''\); const u = db.prepare\(''SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id=1''\).get\(\); Promise.all\([''admin123'',''123456'',''password'',''test1234'',''admin'',''test123''].map\(p => bcrypt.compare\(p, u.password_hash\).then\(r => r ? p : null\)\)\).then\(r => console.log\(''match:'', r.filter\(Boolean\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''./node_modules/bcryptjs''\); const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/betguess.db''\); const u = db.prepare\(''SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id=1''\).get\(\); Promise.all\([''admin123'',''123456'',''password'',''test1234'',''admin'',''test123'',''1234''].map\(p => bcrypt.compare\(p, u.password_hash\).then\(r => r ? p : null\)\)\).then\(r => console.log\(''match:'', r.filter\(Boolean\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''bcrypt''\); const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/betguess.db''\); const u = db.prepare\(''SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id=1''\).get\(\); Promise.all\([''admin123'',''123456'',''password'',''test1234'',''admin'',''test123'',''1234'',''betguess''].map\(p => bcrypt.compare\(p, u.password_hash\).then\(r => r ? p : null\)\)\).then\(r => console.log\(''match:'', r.filter\(Boolean\)\)\);")
